entity.summary: Native Neutron decentralized exchange module providing order-book-style spot exchange infrastructure and on-chain liquidity within the Neutron application ecosystem.
entity.notes: The current Neutron application endpoint remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Duality as the native DEX module on Neutron Chain, classifies it as an order-book DEX, and reports current TVL and substantial cumulative DEX volume. Confidence is medium because a standalone Duality first-party documentation surface was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Neutron official application
evidence.notes: Current Neutron first-party application endpoint remains reachable and is the website surface referenced by the current Duality protocol registry entry.

evidence.title: Duality metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Duality as the native DEX module on Neutron Chain, classifies it as an order-book exchange, and reports current TVL plus cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: Duality DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Duality on Neutron, corroborating the exchange identity and current registry presence.
